metadata.review_trigger: Any requirement, public interface, dependency, partition ownership, evidence claim, or deployment-boundary change

project.name: arrivia-agentic-travel-recs
project.claim_boundary: D5/E6 independently reproduced for one active API replica; REST and MCP may share same-machine SQLite state; upstream services are read-only; no production authentication, horizontal-scale, uptime, compliance, or guarantee beyond the reviewed v0

outcomes: Return partner-aware travel recommendations through REST and MCP with equivalent policy enforcement
Fail explicitly when required member or partner-policy dependencies cannot be trusted
Make reliability, rollback, evidence, and reimplementation decisions reconstructable from tracked files
non_goals: Writing member or partner configuration data
Production authentication, public-internet exposure, or compliance certification
Claiming D5 or E6 before independent clean-context reproduction

environments.purpose: Unit, integration, CLI, and stdio verification
Single-replica API plus controlled WireMock dependencies
Independent bootstrap, failure, recovery, and evidence-location review

limitations: The D4 design gate remains the frozen implementation prerequisite; D5 is earned by the completed implementation plus independent reproduction
Production authentication, public exposure, multi-replica consistency, uptime, compliance, and autonomous policy creation remain non-goals
The final attestation names the reviewed source, image digest, and clean-context review package
